meanings.definition: disturb the balance or stability of
examples: The hostile talks upset the peaceful relations between the two countries

meanings.definition: cause to overturn from an upright or normal position
examples: The cat knocked over the flower vase
the clumsy customer turned over the vase
The foreign team upset the local team

meanings.definition: causing an emotional disturbance; - Herb Caen
examples: his disconcerting habit of greeting friends ferociously and strangers charmingly
